title: Ashen + Prominence Original Soundtrack Support
description: A small, 16x pack adding compatibility between Ashen 16x and Prominence Original Soundtrack
body:
![About](https://i.imgur.com/nMG1TNv.png)

Want to play Ashen with [Prominence Original Soundtrack](https://modrinth.com/mod/prominence-ost)? Tired of the mod's music discs using vanilla textures and looking out of place with Ashen? Then this Add-On is for you!

Place this pack *above* Ashen in your load order.
___

This pack is designed and intended for use with [Ashen 16x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen/) and [Prominence Original Soundtrack](https://modrinth.com/mod/prominence-ost).
___
